rationale: The current ja/index.mdx already contains the fixes suggested in the previous judge report (translated title/subTitle, relative internal link, and localized anchor). It is a high-quality translation that maintains MDX structure and Dan's direct style while ensuring all technical terms are handled correctly. No further high or medium priority fixes are required.
